description: Material Passport for Stage 3 — Analysis Execution. Tracks all artifacts produced during statistical analysis, assumption verification, and result generation.

required_artifacts.name: 分析程序
required_artifacts.description: Complete, annotated R/Python/SAS programs that produce all analysis results from the analysis dataset.

required_artifacts.name: 假设检验结果
required_artifacts.description: Results of all statistical assumption checks (normality, homoscedasticity, proportional hazards, etc.) with test statistics and p-values.

required_artifacts.name: 主要分析结果
required_artifacts.description: Results of the primary endpoint analysis including test statistics, p-values, confidence intervals, and effect estimates.

required_artifacts.name: 次要分析结果
required_artifacts.description: Results of all secondary and exploratory endpoint analyses.

required_artifacts.name: 亚组分析结果
required_artifacts.description: Results of pre-specified subgroup analyses with interaction tests.

required_artifacts.name: 敏感性分析结果
required_artifacts.description: Results of all pre-specified sensitivity analyses.

required_artifacts.name: 缺失数据分析
required_artifacts.description: Missing data handling results: multiple imputation parameters, tipping point analyses, pattern mixture models.

required_artifacts.name: 偏差日志
required_artifacts.description: Record of all deviations from the SAP with justification and impact assessment.

required_artifacts.name: 质量门闸报告
required_artifacts.description: Automated quality gate checks on analysis output: numeric validation, range checks, consistency verification.

optional_artifacts.name: 模型诊断
optional_artifacts.description: Residual plots, influence diagnostics, and model fit statistics for regression models.

optional_artifacts.name: 森林图数据
optional_artifacts.description: Data underlying forest plots for subgroup and meta-analyses.

optional_artifacts.name: Kaplan-Meier曲线数据
optional_artifacts.description: Survival curve data and log-rank test results.

quality_gates.name: SAP合规性检查
quality_gates.description: All analyses specified in the SAP have been executed; any deviations are documented.

quality_gates.name: 结果数值合理性
quality_gates.description: All numeric results are within plausible ranges; no impossible values (e.g., p < 0, probabilities > 1).

quality_gates.name: 可复现性验证
quality_gates.description: Analysis programs run without errors from a clean state and produce identical results.

quality_gates.name: 假设验证完整性
quality_gates.description: All required assumption checks have been performed and results are documented.
